B

G

GameEngine - Class in edu.txst.midterm
The GameEngine class is responsible for the core logic of the maze game.

getCell(int, int) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.Board

Gets the current number of coins collected by the player.

Gets the current number of steps taken by the player.

M

MazeGUI - Class in edu.txst.midterm
The MazeGUI class provides the graphical user interface for the Maze Game.

Constructor that sets up the GUI elements, handles keyboard input, and initializes components.
movePlayer(int, int) - Method in class edu.txst.midterm.GameEngine
Attempts to move the player by the given delta row and col.
